item.title: Qt5 Configuration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Qt5 Configuration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qt5 Configuration Tool
(Utilities)
This program allows users to configure Qt5 settings (theme, font, icons, etc.) under DE/WM without Qt integration.
[b]Requirements:[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 5.9.0
- qtsvg >= 5.9.0
- qttools >= 5.9.0 (For build only)

[b]Translation:[/b]
[url]https://www.transifex.com/projects/p/qt5ct/[/url]

[b]Downloads:[/b]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qt5ct/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
Qt5 Configuration Tool
(Utilities)
This program allows users to configure Qt5 settings (theme, font, icons, etc.) under DE/WM without Qt integration.
[b]Requirements:[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 5.9.0
- qtsvg >= 5.9.0
- qttools >= 5.9.0 (For build only)

[b]Translation:[/b]
[url]https://www.transifex.com/projects/p/qt5ct/[/url]

[b]Downloads:[/b]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qt5ct/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qt5 Configuration Tool
(Utilities)
This program allows users to configure Qt5 settings (theme, font, icons, etc.) under DE/WM without Qt integration.
[b]Requirements:[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 5.9.0
- qtsvg >= 5.9.0
- qttools >= 5.9.0 (For build only)

[b]Translation:[/b]
[url]https://www.transifex.com/projects/p/qt5ct/[/url]

[b]Downloads:[/b]

item.title: Checkers Shells [Chess]
item.itunes:title: Checkers Shells [Chess]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Checkers Shells
(Chess)
Linux offline version of the popular game
This underwater-inspired checker game lets you play checker using these shells.

item.title: Henry Stickmin 5 Fleeing the Complex [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Henry Stickmin 5 Fleeing the Complex [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Henry Stickmin 5 Fleeing the Complex
(Various Games)
Linux offline version of the popular game
Henry is taken to The Wall, a highly secured prison complex said to hold some of the most notorious criminals — and tries to escape from there, with or without an ally.
[read more]

[read more]

item.title: Gun Mayhem 2 [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: Gun Mayhem 2 [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Gun Mayhem 2
(Shooter)
Linux offline version of the popular game
More explosive arena style action! Battle against the AI or with friends in this cartoony platform shooter. Up to 4 players can play at once!

Gun Mayhem returns with brand new maps, and much more:
- new campaign with 16 progressively challenging missions
- challenge levels to test your skills
- 7 custom game modes
- new guns, perks, and customization options
Controls

*** controls can be edited in game options ***

Player 1 controls:
Arrow keys - movement
Z - shoot
X - throw bomb

Player 2 controls:
WASD - movement
T - shoot
Y - throw bomb

Players 3 and 4 controls can be edited in options
[read more]
item.description:
Gun Mayhem 2
(Shooter)
Linux offline version of the popular game
More explosive arena style action! Battle against the AI or with friends in this cartoony platform shooter. Up to 4 players can play at once!

Gun Mayhem returns with brand new maps, and much more:
- new campaign with 16 progressively challenging missions
- challenge levels to test your skills
- 7 custom game modes
- new guns, perks, and customization options
Controls

*** controls can be edited in game options ***

Player 1 controls:
Arrow keys - movement
Z - shoot
X - throw bomb

Player 2 controls:
WASD - movement
T - shoot
Y - throw bomb

Players 3 and 4 controls can be edited in options
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Gun Mayhem 2
(Shooter)
Linux offline version of the popular game
More explosive arena style action! Battle against the AI or with friends in this cartoony platform shooter. Up to 4 players can play at once!

Gun Mayhem returns with brand new maps, and much more:
- new campaign with 16 progressively challenging missions
- challenge levels to test your skills
- 7 custom game modes
- new guns, perks, and customization options
Controls

*** controls can be edited in game options ***

Player 1 controls:
Arrow keys - movement
Z - shoot
X - throw bomb

Player 2 controls:
WASD - movement
T - shoot
Y - throw bomb

Players 3 and 4 controls can be edited in options
[read more]
